payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed panel and a vertical brushed-metal handle; occupies most of the crop and is right-edge cropped (partial view of cabinet side and wall visible); matte surface with a small top-left light reflection; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m away).
